subject: The Big Summer Sale: Up To 15% Off Sitewide
body:
[Maisonette Logo](https://www.maisonette.com/)

https://www.maisonette.com/edits/fall-fashion-sale?

[The Big Summer Sale - 15% Off Apparel & Accessories & 10% off Play, Home, & Gear](https://www.maisonette.com/collections/trending-now)

[Up to 40% Markdowns](https://www.maisonette.com/collections/sale)

*Promo Code Rules: Use promo code SUNSHINE on orders $150+ for extra savings — 15% off apparel and accessories, 10% off play, home, and gear. Minimum purchase requirements apply. Offer cannot be combined with other promotions or applied to previous purchases. Final sale items are not eligible for return. Promo code valid through 06/17/26 at 4 AM EST. [Exclusions Apply.](https://www.maisonette.com/pages/promo-codes)
